description: A governance-first operations layer for running separated domain AI systems with auditability and human gates.
problem_solved: Running several domain-specific AI operating systems without mixing context, governance, or audit trails.
workflow_summary: A signed event or operator action enters a domain layer, is normalized, routed into a governed task flow, executed by the right worker, and returned to product-facing workspaces with review and traceability.
public_safe_tech_scope: Public-safe scope: domain separation, task orchestration, human approval gates, memory boundaries, and product-facing workspaces.
high_level_stack: Multi-tenant web apps, signed event intake, orchestration layer, structured storage, vector memory, and audit trails.
what_stays_private: Internal control surfaces, routing policies, worker wiring, memory namespaces, governance rules, deployment topology, and all private infrastructure must remain private.
lacunas: The exact product surface exposed to end users should be confirmed manually before publication.

public_title: Scenario Simulation and Digital Twin Workspace
description: A scenario analysis workspace that uses structured inputs, simulated agents, and layered evidence to explore possible futures.
problem_solved: Teams need a way to reason about uncertain scenarios without relying only on static notes or ad hoc discussion.
workflow_summary: A user frames a scenario, the system structures the context, simulates multiple actors, tracks evolving signals, and returns an analytical output with scenario-oriented evidence.
public_safe_tech_scope: Public-safe scope: scenario setup, simulation rounds, entity extraction, structured analysis, and decision support.
high_level_stack: React front-end, service layer, structured data store, charting, document handling, and LLM-backed simulation logic.
what_stays_private: Prompting strategy, premium feed configuration, ranking logic, simulation policy, and infrastructure details remain private.
lacunas: No public-safe screenshots are bundled yet.
The exact public positioning between strategy tooling and health-oriented simulation should be confirmed manually.

description: A document-aware analytical assistant that combines retrieval, structured ingestion, and audit-friendly evidence panels.
problem_solved: Analysts need evidence-backed answers across case material and reference material without losing traceability.
workflow_summary: Documents are ingested and indexed, retrieval combines multiple evidence sources, and the user receives an answer paired with supporting evidence and processing status.
public_safe_tech_scope: Public-safe scope: ingestion pipeline, evidence-first response model, administrative controls, and high-level retrieval architecture.
high_level_stack: Web client, API layer, asynchronous ingestion, structured database, vector or graph retrieval, and admin controls.
what_stays_private: Prompt templates, ranking weights, provider configuration, routing rules, and operational storage structure remain private.
lacunas: Public-safe screenshots still need to be captured manually.

description: A clinical analysis workspace for blood gas interpretation and related exam review with deterministic support and controlled AI assistance.
problem_solved: Clinicians need faster structured interpretation of blood gas and related exam material without turning the product into an opaque black box.
workflow_summary: A user submits or types exam information, the system extracts structured content, applies deterministic calculations, and returns a clinical summary supported by controlled AI assistance.
public_safe_tech_scope: Public-safe scope: document intake, OCR-assisted extraction, deterministic formula layer, user and admin surfaces, and controlled reporting.
high_level_stack: Web app, compatibility API layer, structured persistence, object storage, deterministic Python engine, and optional retrieval support.
what_stays_private: Clinical rules, internal variable mappings, formula graph details, access-control internals, and operational deployment details remain private.
lacunas: A public-safe demo case still needs to be recreated synthetically.

public_title: Healthcare Unit Operations and Indicator Management
description: A web application for healthcare unit management that turns fragmented operational indicators into monitored action, review, and improvement cycles.
problem_solved: Healthcare teams often manage indicators, action plans, and operational visibility in scattered tools with low traceability.
workflow_summary: Operational data feeds dashboards, indicators are recorded and trended, action plans are tracked through PDCA cycles, and teams review progress in a single workspace.
public_safe_tech_scope: Public-safe scope: dashboarding, indicator management, action-plan orchestration, improvement cycles, and operational decision support.
high_level_stack: React front-end, Django backend, multi-tenant identity, structured database, private object storage, charting, and optional background jobs.
what_stays_private: Business rules, calculation detail, operational thresholds, client-specific indicators, event payloads, and private infrastructure remain private.
lacunas: Any numeric impact statement must be inserted manually after validation.

public_title: Regulatory Exposure Calculator for Crypto P2P Operators
description: A legal-operational calculator that helps assess regulatory exposure and decision paths for crypto P2P activity.
problem_solved: Crypto P2P operators need a structured way to assess regulatory exposure and possible transition paths without relying on ad hoc opinion only.
workflow_summary: The user provides operational characteristics, the system scores exposure, estimates regulatory direction, and returns structured decision guidance in a public-safe high-level format.
public_safe_tech_scope: Public-safe scope: exposure assessment, structured outputs, decision framing, and report-oriented presentation.
high_level_stack: Web application, calculation engine, structured persistence, controlled reporting layer, and private knowledge-backed logic.
what_stays_private: Scoring logic, legal heuristics, response templates, evidence corpus, and all internal operating assumptions remain private.
lacunas: A fully synthetic public-safe sample assessment still needs manual approval.

description: A phase-based M&A decision workspace that combines memory, document discipline, and agent-assisted reasoning for seller-side work.
problem_solved: Seller-side M&A work generates fragmented knowledge, document pressure, and high-cost coordination across phases.
workflow_summary: The workspace follows the deal phase, loads the right memory and evidence layer, asks blocking questions when needed, and helps the team produce reports, memos, and structured decision outputs.
public_safe_tech_scope: Public-safe scope: phase orchestration, knowledge curation, decision discipline, memory, and report generation.
high_level_stack: Conversational front-end, service layer, structured persistence, document generation, knowledge indexing, and orchestration logic.
what_stays_private: Deal-specific memory, prompts, decision rules, evidence hierarchy, and document-generation internals remain private.
lacunas: A public-safe walkthrough of one deal phase still needs to be authored manually.

public_title: Priority Matrix for Structured Decision Making
description: A lightweight web app for prioritizing issues and initiatives through a structured GUT framework.
problem_solved: Teams need a simple but structured way to decide what deserves action first.
workflow_summary: Users register items, score urgency-gravity-trend, and review the resulting ordering in a persistent workspace.
public_safe_tech_scope: Public-safe scope: scoring flow, ranking logic at a high level, persistence, and simple operational review.
high_level_stack: Web app, structured persistence, authentication, and a simple service layer.
what_stays_private: Tenant rules, storage details, and implementation specifics of persistence and access control remain private.
lacunas: A public-safe screenshot pack still needs to be created.

description: A structured Ishikawa builder that turns guided inputs into consistent SVG and PNG outputs.
problem_solved: Teams often create fishbone diagrams manually, with inconsistent layout and low reuse.
workflow_summary: The user selects a template, fills guided fields, previews the result, and exports a diagram artifact in a stable visual format.
public_safe_tech_scope: Public-safe scope: template registry, guided input, preview, export, and isolation of rendering logic.
high_level_stack: Web UI, backend-for-frontend, renderer service, template manifests, and structured persistence.
what_stays_private: Template-zone definitions, internal assets, storage wiring, and project-host integration details remain private.
lacunas: This public profile describes the target product surface rather than a fully packaged open-source implementation.

public_title: Legal Dossier and Case Operations Workspace
description: A multi-tenant legal operations workspace for dossiers, documents, calculations, and controlled AI-assisted workflows.
problem_solved: Legal operations generate fragmented documents, intake flows, calculations, and review tasks that are hard to manage consistently.
workflow_summary: Teams manage dossiers, incoming documents, structured calculations, and guided knowledge workflows from a single operational surface.
public_safe_tech_scope: Public-safe scope: dossier-centric operations, document intake, structured calculations, and high-level workflow support.
high_level_stack: Multi-tenant web app, backend API, object storage, structured database, and controlled AI features.
what_stays_private: Client matter structure, calculation rules, document schemas, prompts, and operational controls remain private.
lacunas: This app is intentionally documented at a very high level.
Public-safe screenshots and wording should be reviewed manually before publication.

description: A multi-tenant analysis platform that answers over document context with retrieval, guided prompts, and controlled operational review.
problem_solved: Document-heavy teams need structured answers across uploaded files and administrative knowledge without losing control over context.
workflow_summary: Users upload files, run open or guided analysis flows, and receive answers grounded in retrieved context from controlled knowledge sources.
public_safe_tech_scope: Public-safe scope: RAG workflow, guided-question mode, administrative knowledge management, and multi-tenant boundaries.
high_level_stack: React front-end, API layer, structured database, vector store, worker process, and object storage.
what_stays_private: Provider routing, operational prompts, retrieval configuration, ranking choices, and deployment wiring remain private.
lacunas: Any public-safe synthetic document set still needs manual creation.
